notes:
Pirate Summer's item catalog.  Items are pickable up from the world, stored in Sam's duffel (16 slots max), and gifted to campers for friendship.

Gift math:
  · a preferred item (in a camper's preferred_items list, exact-match by id) → +2 friendship
  · a non-preferred item → +1 friendship
  · a wildcard item (rare) → +1 friendship for anyone

Each item has:
  · id            · slug used in inventory + gift lookups
  · display       · label seen in the duffel
  · notes         · flavor for the give-a-gift panel
  · giftable      · false for items that can't be gifted (map, journal)
  · wildcard      · true for the small set of universally-appreciated gifts
  · aliases       · alternative names campers might use for the item in
    their preferred_items list (matched case-insensitive)

Wave H ships fifteen items · five pickable in the current three
zones (cabin_sturgeon, camp_path, alder_pond) + ten authored for
future zones (mess hall bulletin, boathouse, north bluff, ghost
ship).

items.notes: A palm-sized river stone worn smooth by water.  Warm from the sun.
A camera lens cap.  Chipped at the edge.  Nikon.
A #2 pencil, freshly sharpened.  Fits nice in the hand.
A whole white cockle shell.  Not chipped anywhere.  Rare.
A green felt bookmark shaped like a leaf.  Someone left it in the mess hall.
A 1974 penny, coppery, unusually bright.
A well-thumbed paperback.  Bea's copy · she has a spare.
A carved wooden whistle.  Sounds like a chickadee if you know how to use it.
A NOAA pamphlet.  Tides for the Oregon coast, July 1994.
A dog-eared paperback of dad jokes.  From Xavier's dad's magic supply.

items.display: unopened bag of shelled sunflower seeds
items.notes: A gas-station bag.  Salted.  Full.
aliases: unopened bag of shelled sunflower seeds

items.notes: A tiny cream postcard with a photo of Coimbra's library.  Older than either of Sam's parents.
A slim graph-paper notebook.  Blank.  New.
Blue-and-green thread, tightly braided.  Someone's leftover from last summer.
The folded paper you found in the lost-and-found box.  Signed W.A. — 1987.  Do not gift.
A coiled length of dry Manila rope from the cave floor.  It has held things.
The satchel from the caves' treasure room.  A silver whistle, a folded chart, a letter in Portuguese.  Wilson recognizes it.  Do not gift.

A creased color photograph.  Thirteen young adults at Camp Sweetgum in staff polos.  A boy in a cast · Andrew.  A tall counselor at the far right · Peter Halstrom.  A girl second from left · nineteen · dark hair · 'NIKA V.' written on the back in ballpoint.  Do not gift.

items.display: a page from a counselor's journal
items.notes: A single lined page torn from a spiral notebook.  July 27, 1976.  Handwriting careful, tight.  Signed only 'V.'  Mentions Andrew as if he were still alive · she doesn't know yet.  Do not gift.
A Maxell UD-90 in a Ziploc bag.  Label reads 'SUMMER 76 · V · SIDE A' in the same handwriting as the journal page.  You need a tape deck.  The boathouse shortwave has one.  Do not gift.
